---
title: "Research"
---

My research sits at the intersection of operations management, information systems, and AI-enabled service operations. I study [TODO: central research question or phenomenon].

## Research Areas

- [TODO: research area 1]
- [TODO: research area 2]
- [TODO: research area 3]

## Selected Projects

### [Project Title]

[TODO: 2-4 sentence project summary, including question, setting, method, and contribution.]

### [Project Title]

[TODO: 2-4 sentence project summary, including question, setting, method, and contribution.]
